message:
feat(dashboard): add unified dashboard state aggregator module (ft-3hbv9)

Introduces DashboardManager that combines health snapshots from cost tracking,
quota gate, rate limits, and backpressure subsystems into a single DashboardState
for TUI rendering, web API responses, and robot-mode JSON output.

- SystemHealthTier enum (Green/Yellow/Red/Black) with Ord for worst-case aggregation
- Panel types: CostPanel, RateLimitPanel, BackpressurePanel, QuotaPanel
- DashboardTelemetry with counter pattern (snapshot_count, update counts)
- Convenience methods: worst_launch_verdict(), has_critical_alerts()
- 16 unit tests covering all panels, health escalation, serde roundtrip
- 10 property tests (proptest) for invariant verification

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
